untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-instrument ratio analysis (S&P-to-Russell ratio) and macroeconomic regime detection ('economic recovery expected'). The backtesting engine does not support cross-instrument ratio calculations or external economic indicators. The 'declining ratio' condition cannot be expressed using single-instrument OHLCV-derived indicators only. Reversal logic on price/SMA used as fallback, but this does not capture the original signal intent.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 is context-dependent and regime-specific, requiring: (1) two separate instruments with ratio comparison, (2) macroeconomic regime detection not available in indicator set. Entry conditions 'declining S&P/Russell ratio' and 'economic recovery expected' are untranslatable. Exit condition 'AUTHOR_SILENT' interpreted as mean-reversion using SMA. This translation is approximate and should not be used without manual review and external ratio/macro data sources.
